description.content: Site-specific wind hazard analysis per AS/NZS 1170.2 and ASCE 7 standards
Returns site-specific wind hazard parameters according to AS/NZS 1170.2 for the specified coordinates. API key must be included as a query parameter.

query.description: (Required) Your Revolutio Hazard API subscription key
Optional Google API key for elevation data

response.name: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key
Rate limit exceeded or duplicate request in progress

description.content: Returns site-specific wind hazard parameters. POST method allows passing the API key in the request header for better security.
Snow and ice loading parameters per applicable standards
Returns site-specific snow and ice loading parameters for the specified coordinates according to applicable standards.

response.name: Snow and ice hazard analysis results

description.content: Returns site-specific snow and ice loading parameters via POST.
Returns site-specific seismic hazard parameters for the specified coordinates.
Returns seismic hazard parameters via POST.
Multi-hazard combined analysis returning all available parameters for a site
Returns all available hazard parameters (wind, snow, ice, seismic) for a given site in a single request. Recommended for comprehensive site assessments.
Returns all hazard parameters for a site via POST.

The Revolutio Hazard API (formerly CHECKWIND.API) provides site-specific structural engineering hazard parameters for wind, snow, ice, and seismic analysis. Trusted by over 750 companies across construction, fabrication, power distribution, signage, structural engineering, and telecommunications, the API returns location-based load parameters according to international standards including AS/NZS 1170.2, AS 4055, ASCE 7, and others across 40+ countries in Oceania, Asia, the Middle East, North America, South America, and Europe.
